tiktok.caption: If you and your partner fight about money, you're not just arguing — you're losing $760,000. Here's the math nobody talks about.

youtube_short.title: Your Partner's Money Habits Will Cost You $760K
youtube_short.description: 70% of couples fight about money regularly — and that conflict has a price tag most people never calculate. Kansas State University found that money-fighting couples are 37% more likely to divorce, costing $15K-$30K in legal fees alone. Even if you stay together, misaligned couples retire with $760,000 less. The fix is simpler than you think: a monthly money date. 30 minutes. Aligned goals. Start tonight. #personalfinance #money #couples #relationships #wealthbuilding
